# Chapter 6: Vibrations  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 Single-degree-of-freedom oscillators (15) · 6.2 Damped vibration (12) · 6.3 Forced response and resonance (15) · 6.4 Multi-DOF systems and modal analysis (18) · 6.5 Continuous systems (strings, beams) (15) · 6.6 Random vibration (12) · 6.7 Vibration measurement and signature analysis (12) · 6.8 Failure section: Tacoma Narrows, Millennium Bridge, machinery resonance (11)

**Archetype**: stability, control, failure. **Project**: characterise the vibration response of a household object; identify dominant modes. **Exercises**: 35.
